title: Small Business Financing | Small Business Financing Up To $250,000 | Cardiff.co
metaDescription: Looking for small business financing? Get approved in 2 minutes or less and get your funds within 24 hours at Cardiff. We have funded over $12 billion for small businesses across the US.

hero.headline: BORROW BETTER
hero.subtitle: You wouldn't wait ten minutes for a latte, so why wait longer for business financing?

intro.title: Cardiff is cash for your business, on your terms.
intro.body: Owning a business is hard enough. That's why we make it easy to get access to the funds you need to keep it running.

steps.title: Apply Online
steps.body: Tell us a little bit about your business and get approved in less than 2 minutes.

steps.title: Get Approved
steps.body: Choose the terms that work best for your budget and get on with your day.

steps.title: Withdraw Funds
steps.body: Link your business checking account to your Cardiff financing and access your funds immediately.

steps.title: Repayment
steps.body: Payments are remitted automatically through ACH withdrawal either daily, weekly, or monthly.

steps.title: Renew Your Funding
steps.body: Pay off your balance early and gain access to more capital at better terms.

alternativeLending.title: Alternative Business Lending With Cardiff
alternativeLending.body: If you're exploring alternative business lending options because traditional lenders turned down your business or you can't wait for rigid loan approval processes, you're in the right place.

fastFlexible.title: Fast, Flexible Funding On Your Terms

designed.title: Financing Designed for Your Business Model
paragraphs: We support a range of industries, including retail, healthcare, construction, hospitality, and professional services. Our financing addresses unique business needs such as cash flow timing, seasonal gaps, and time-sensitive opportunities.
Many of our loans tailor to the needs of the small businesses we serve, including:
Merchant capital advances (MCAs) and invoice financing tie repayment to your income cycle. Payments stay manageable because they fluctuate with your income.
With no collateral requirement and an emphasis on strong business fundamentals, Cardiff's MCAs, term loans, credit cards, and lines of credit are more attainable for small businesses.
Your past doesn't define you. If the future looks promising, we can help you maintain smooth operations with funding aligned to your revenue patterns.
We can help you turn future transactions into the working capital you need now. A Cardiff MCA provides the money you need upfront with manageable payments based on your income.
Our loan options help maximize your operational flexibility while minimizing friction.

betterCredit.title: Better Business Credit Options Without the Guesswork
paragraphs: Unlike conventional lenders that prioritize your credit score above all else, Cardiff considers the full picture, including revenue trends, business potential, and overall financial health. That means more business credit options for companies that traditional banks overlook.

Need to get a business loan quickly? Our streamlined process makes it easy to apply and get approved. Many of our clients receive funds the same day. It's lending built for the realities of running a business, not banking protocol.

And when your needs evolve? Cardiff evolves with you. From short-term cash flow loans to longer-term growth funding, we offer guidance every step of the way. You're building something, and we're proud to help finance it.

midCta.title: Apply Once. Move Fast. Grow Confidently.
lines: Your search for the best "financing for my business" stops here.
No guesswork. No unnecessary hoops. Just actionable capital when you need it.

whyCardiff.title: Why Cardiff?
paragraphs: At Cardiff, we understand that momentum matters. You aren't just chasing numbers—you're building teams, launching products, signing leases, and growing your reach. Every day lost to outdated underwriting is a missed opportunity.
When you're ready to move, Cardiff makes it possible.

faq.a: Alternative business lending refers to non-bank funding sources that focus on a business's overall financial health and revenue trends instead of relying solely on credit scores. These lenders, including Cardiff, evaluate the full picture of your business—cash flow, sales history, and growth potential—to deliver faster, more flexible financing.

faq.q: How do unsecured business loans work?
faq.a: Unsecured business loans require no collateral. Lenders base approval for these loans on other factors, such as your business's performance, cash flow, and overall financial health. These loans can help you access fast capital without putting assets at risk.

faq.q: Can I get funding even with a low credit score?
faq.a: Yes. Cardiff considers more than your credit score. We look at revenue trends, business fundamentals, and your future trajectory. Strong cash flow and consistent operations can qualify you for funding even if traditional banks declined you.

faq.q: What types of businesses use merchant financing?
faq.a: Restaurants, retailers, contractors, dental practices, medical clinics, auto repair shops, salons, trucking companies, and many other small businesses rely on merchant financing to bridge cash flow gaps, fund equipment, and seize growth opportunities.

faq.q: How fast can I get approved for a business loan?
faq.a: Most applicants receive a decision in under 2 minutes and can have funds in their account the same day they are approved.

faq.q: What documents do I need to apply for a business loan?
faq.a: Typically you'll need three months of recent business bank statements, basic business information, and a valid government-issued ID. Larger funding amounts may require additional documentation.

faq.q: What's the difference between a revenue-based loan and a cash flow loan?
faq.a: A revenue-based loan ties repayments to a percentage of your incoming sales—payments fluctuate with your revenue. A cash flow loan provides a lump sum repaid on a fixed schedule based on your historical cash flow.

faq.q: Are business loans good for expansion?
faq.a: Yes. Business loans, lines of credit, and equipment financing are commonly used to fund expansion—new locations, hiring, equipment purchases, marketing campaigns, and inventory increases.

faq.q: Is there a penalty for paying off my loan early?
faq.a: Cardiff customers can pay off their balance early to gain access to more capital at better terms. No prepayment penalty stands between you and renewal.

testimonials.quote: Cardiff funded our equipment purchase the same day. Their team understood our business and made the entire process feel personal—not transactional.
testimonials.author: Chad Smith

testimonials.quote: I worked with Jerry Stone on a used truck deal. He couldn't have been better to work with for me and the customer. I would recommend anyone looking for financing to reach out to Jerry at Cardiff.
testimonials.author: Bo Burgarello

testimonials.quote: Ryan and Denis are first class. They helped us get financing when we had no other options. If you're looking to expand, revamp, or start your business, you NEED to give them a call.
testimonials.author: Eric Goldberg
